mapper.select: SELECT music_id, name, owner, comment, mark FROM music_info WHERE accessibility='public' LIMIT #{start}, #{limit};
SELECT url FROM music_info WHERE lyric_md5_code=#{musicMd5Code} LIMIT 1;
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT music_info.music_id FROM music_info WHERE music_md5_code=#{musicMd5Code} AND lyric_md5_code=#{lyricMd5Code});
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT music_info.music_id FROM music_info WHERE name=#{name});
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO music_info (music_id, name, owner, accessibility, lyric, url, music_md5_code, lyric_md5_code) VALUE (#{musicId}, #{name}, #{owner}, #{accessibility}, #{lyric}, #{url}, #{musicMd5Code}, #{lyricMd5Code});
INSERT INTO user_music_relation_info(record_id, user_id, music_id) VALUE (#{recordId}, #{userId}, #{musicId})
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT user_info.user_id FROM user_info WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND password=#{password});
SELECT user_info.user_id FROM user_info WHERE username=#{username};
SELECT user_info.user_id FROM user_info WHERE email=#{email};
SELECT user_info.user_id FROM user_info WHERE phone_number=#{phoneNumber};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_info(user_id, username, password, email, phone_number) VALUE (#{userId}, #{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phoneNumber});
mapper.select: SELECT music_info.music_id, music_info.name, music_info.owner, music_info.comment, music_info.mark FROM music_info WHERE music_info.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords},'%') AND music_info.accessibility = 'PUBLIC' LIMIT #{start}, #{limit};
SELECT music_info.lyric FROM mybatis.music_info WHERE music_info.music_id=#{musicId};
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM mybatis.user_music_relation_info WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND music_id=#{musicId});
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_music_relation_info WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND music_id=#{musicId};
